topic: I have a daughter who is not in any of the family photos but she is here
title: I Have a Daughter Who Is Not in Any of the Family Photos. But She Is Here. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My daughter is standing in our kitchen right now. She has never appeared in any photo we have ever taken.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a quiet residential kitchen at dusk, a child's drawing on the refrigerator, a small pair of shoes by the back door, no person visible in frame, soft pendant light overhead, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Her name is Emma. She is six. Brown hair. Quiet.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a child's bedroom at evening, a small bed with floral sheets, stuffed animals arranged on the pillow, a name plaque on the wall reading EMMA, soft nightlight glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: We have hundreds of photos. Phone. Camera roll. Printed albums.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a kitchen table covered with printed family photographs spread out, a few photo albums open beside them, ambient afternoon light, no people in frame, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: She is in none of them.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a single family photograph on a wall showing two adults and one child, a clear empty space visible between them where another small figure might fit, the photo faintly faded, ambient ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I noticed last August. School yearbook arrived.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an open elementary school yearbook on a kitchen table, a class photo page visible, a hand pointing at a row of children, ambient afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: She was in the page. The class photo. But not the printed yearbook copy in our house.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of two side by side photographs of the same school class group, one image showing a row of children and the other identical row but with one child missing from a specific position, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a smartphone screen showing a photo gallery with thumbnail rows of family photos, the images visible but no specific child appearing in any, dim home office light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Hundreds of pictures. Birthday parties. Christmases. Beach trips. Never her.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a laptop screen showing a photo backup folder with rows of thumbnail images, the screen glow casting dim light on a desk, the rest of the room in shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Other parents have photos with her in them. Just not us.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone showing a text message conversation with photo attachments visible, the photos showing a child clearly visible at a birthday party, dim ambient evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My wife says I am being ridiculous. She is fine.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of two coffee cups on a kitchen counter at morning, soft sunlight through a window, a child's plastic cereal bowl beside them, no people in frame, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I tried to take a picture of Emma yesterday at breakfast.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand holding a smartphone aimed across a kitchen table, the camera screen showing an empty chair where a child would sit, breakfast dishes visible on the table, soft morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The chair was empty in the photo. She was sitting there. She was eating cereal.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone photo gallery thumbnail showing an empty chair at a kitchen table, a half-finished cereal bowl on the table in front of the empty chair, the seat clearly unoccupied in the image, vertical 9:16 framing
